2 = Individual was included in Medicaid Expansion CHIP and subject to enhanced federal matching for

include low-income children whose family incomes are above Medicaid income eligibility thresholds. 

3 = Individual was not Medicaid Expansion CHIP-eligible, but was included in a separate Title XXI
